lastMilestoneCommit: HEAD (cross-docking cycle 10 commit, this same push)

e2e.label: Playwright smoke gate
e2e.note: [e2e-unverified] Seed-script RLS blocker is FIXED (prisma/seed.ts wraps every write to an RLS-protected table in a transaction that sets app.current_tenant_id via set_config — verified live). But login still 401s: the running app never sets app.current_tenant_id anywhere in its own request pipeline, so FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY on 12 tables makes them invisible to any DB role without BYPASSRLS — confirmed via psql (SELECT count(*) FROM users: 0 without context, 1 with it). This is a P0 cross-cutting gap (the RLS migration was never wired into packages/database/src/index.ts's Prisma extension) — see MODULE_REGISTRY.md 'Critical cross-cutting finding' section. A same-session attempt to fix that shared extension was correctly blocked by the harness as a self-contradictory unilateral change and was reverted; it needs a dedicated session with full regression testing across every module touching those tables.
